description: A client wants to migrate their on-premise servers to a public cloud like AWS or Azure and needs a quote.

nodes.task_description: Run a discovery tool on the client's on-premise environment to inventory all servers and their specifications.

expected_outcome.expected: The sales engineer has a complete list of servers to be migrated.

nodes.task_description: Use the discovery data to estimate the monthly cost of running the equivalent servers in the cloud.

expected_outcome.expected: An estimated cloud spend is calculated.

nodes.task_description: Create a quote that includes the professional services hours for the migration project and the estimated ongoing monthly cloud costs.

expected_outcome.expected: A comprehensive quote is provided to the client.
